concerns.detail: Partial real name of student ('li j') that could identify a private individual
Ethnic/personal attack based on origin ('Middle East monopoly') rather than concrete advising practices

Removal of specific substantive allegations about research integrity (GitHub star manipulation evidence, threats to students) and references to supporting posts (Xiaohongshu, Zhihu), replacing them with dismissal of evidence
concerns.excerpt: 小红书去年就有人github token泄露，发现被操控点了他们lab五六个项目，后面被chao私信“威胁”删了lab名字
